headline: Just How Much Risk Is Built Into ISRG Stock?
summary: The options market has priced a sizable range of outcomes for the surgical robotics leader, and if you hold the shares, you are already carrying that full exposure.

headline: Stryker: The Market Is Overreacting To One Disrupted Quarter
summary: Stryker (SYK) buy rating after a rare Q1 miss from a temporary cyber disruption. Full-year guidance holds; demand strong.
